GLOG.AttributeTooltipStrength: Strength determines your melee attack damage, ability to lift heavy objects, and other feats of physical power
GLOG.AttributeTooltipDexterity: Dexterity affects your defense, manual dexterity, and ability to move quickly or silently
GLOG.AttributeTooltipConstitution: Constitution improves your hit points and ability to resist physical trauma, disease, and poison
GLOG.AttributeTooltipIntelligence: Intelligence affects investigation skills, crafting, spell creation, and your ability to understand complex ideas
GLOG.AttributeTooltipWisdom: Wisdom determines your initiative, perception, and ability to resist mental effects
GLOG.AttributeTooltipCharisma: Charisma affects your interactions with NPCs, reactions, and ability to resist strange magic
GLOG.HPTooltip: Hit Protection represents your ability to avoid serious harm. When reduced to 0, you must make Trauma saves to avoid wounds
GLOG.XPTooltip: Experience Points are gained from gold. When you reach the required amount, you can level up
GLOG.LevelTooltip: Your character level determines your maximum templates, attack bonus, and hit dice
GLOG.TemplatesCountTooltip: Templates represent your character classes. You can have up to 4 templates at maximum level
GLOG.AttackTooltip: Your attack bonus is added to attack rolls. It increases with your level
GLOG.DefenseTooltip: Defense makes you harder to hit. It's calculated from armor, Dexterity bonus, and encumbrance
GLOG.InitiativeTooltip: Initiative determines your turn order in combat. It's based on your Wisdom
GLOG.MovementTooltip: Movement determines how far you can travel in combat and exploration
GLOG.EncumbranceTooltip: Encumbrance represents how much you're carrying. It reduces your defense when too high
GLOG.SpellDiceTooltip: Magic Dice are used to cast spells. They're refreshed after a rest, but some are exhausted when used
GLOG.SpellSlotsTooltip: Spell Slots are the number of different spells you can memorize at once
GLOG.CombatMovementTooltip: How far you can move in one combat round
GLOG.ExplorationMovementTooltip: How far you can move in one exploration turn (10 minutes)
GLOG.RunningMovementTooltip: How far you can run in a round when not in combat
GLOG.MilesPerDayTooltip: How many miles you can travel in a day of normal travel
GLOG.Name: Name
GLOG.NoSpellDiceLeft: You have no spell dice left!
GLOG.NotEnoughXP: Not enough XP to level up!
GLOG.DeleteWoundPrompt: Are you sure you want to remove this wound?

SETTINGS.MacroShorthandHint: Enable macro shorthand syntax for inline rolls
